problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: Combining Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
